headline: How The CSX (CSX) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Freight Assumptions
summary: CSX's fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly higher, from US$40.31 to US$40.81, a move of about US$0.50 per share that keeps the stock story firmly in focus. Behind that modest change, Street research has been active, with some firms lifting targets into the low to mid US$40s and up to US$50, while others trim by about US$1 as they reassess freight trends and earnings assumptions. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the wider CSX narrative and what to...
